title: grid-template-areas
description: Defines a grid layout using named regions written as ASCII art. Each quoted string is a row; repeated names span multiple columns. Elements snap into place using grid-area.
challenge: The elements already know their area names but the layout isn't defined yet. Add grid-template-areas to .page so the header spans both columns on the first row, and sidebar sits left of main on the second row.
realWorldUsage: Common in dashboard shells and page templates where the layout has a named structure. Rearranging for different screen sizes is then a matter of redefining grid-template-areas in a media query, without touching any child element styles.
